description_long: This is a modern office building with a distinctive cylindrical rooftop structure and a predominantly white and black facade. The building features five main floors with large, regularly spaced windows, and a rooftop area that appears to include a circular mechanical or communal space. The exterior is accented by vertical black columns and horizontal bands, giving it a sleek, contemporary appearance. There are landscaped areas with trees and greenery on the surrounding pavement, and the building is set within a paved urban context with adjacent roads and sidewalks. The main entrance is recessed and likely features glass doors, providing a welcoming access point. Visible signage is present on the upper facade, indicating the building's commercial function.
description: A modern, multi-story office building with a cylindrical rooftop feature, white and black facade, and large, regular windows. The structure is surrounded by paved roads and landscaped greenery.
description_view_0: This view highlights the building's side facade, showing the cylindrical rooftop, vertical black columns, and landscaped area with trees on the left.
description_view_1: The front facade is visible, featuring the main entrance, prominent signage, and a clear view of the regular window pattern across all floors.
description_view_2: The rear of the building is shown, with a focus on the back entrance, additional greenery, and the continuation of the window pattern.
description_view_3: This side view displays the building's vertical black columns, stairwell features, and a landscaped area with trees on the right.
attribute_window_pattern: Regularly spaced, rectangular windows arranged in horizontal bands across each floor, separated by dark vertical and horizontal mullions.
attribute_building_entrance_type: recessed entry with double glass doors
